summary: Hallway/lobby area leading to a walk-in wardrobe within a bedroom. The space is presented in good decorative order with painted walls in white and grey-blue tones, oak-effect laminate to the hall and grey fitted carpet to the wardrobe area. Walls show light scuffs and scratch marks in places; carpet shows shading/foot traffic marks. The fitted wardrobe is grey wood-effect with chrome hinges, fitted with shelving and hanging rails, and contains the tenant's hangers and bedding.

items.description: Emulsioned ceiling in white, smooth plaster finish throughout hallway and wardrobe area.

items.name: Walls
items.description: Emulsioned walls in white and grey-blue tones, smooth plaster finish.
defects: scratch marks and light scuffs eye to mid level right hand side wall P180
